name: Hobby Collection | Full-Stack Gallery
detail: A sleek, personal gallery built with React and Go to showcase and catalog a collection of Gunpla and figures. It features a secure PostgreSQL database with JWT authentication for management and utilizes Cloudinary for high-performance, optimized media hosting. This project demonstrates a complete full-stack workflow, combining a responsive UI with a scalable backend for efficient hobby tracking.

name: Ama3 Bot | AI Discord Integration
detail: A high-performance Discord bot built in Go that uses a lightweight model for intent classification to efficiently route context-aware AI conversations. It ensures 100% reliability through a dual-model fallback strategy and manages short-term memory sessions with Go's concurrency for a seamless user experience. This architecture delivers a responsive, resilient, and scalable solution for multi-user AI interactions.
